contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 90
- Description: Capoeira platform — Phase 2: Core static site build (4 pages + 4 JS modules + CSS)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/capoeira/pull/2
  
  Details:
  Phase 2: Tribo Bahia Mirim Capoeira Practice Platform — Core Site Build
  
  Built the full static site in the capoeira/ repo. 11 files, 2,363 lines:
  - index.html — landing page with hero, narrative, photo gallery, how-it-works cards, Stripe donate CTA
  - practice.html — session generator + practice flow + history dashboard
  - library.html — searchable/filterable move table (text search + theme/difficulty/tempo dropdowns)
  - transparency.html — donation flow summary with live Stripe fee calculator
  - styles.css — full design system mirroring agroverse_shop conventions
  - session-generator.js — theme rotation (skip-last-2, LRU fallback), weighted move pick (difficulty bias × recency penalty × ~45min subset-sum), music arc sequencing
  - practice-flow.js — move-by-move flow: video embed, timer, progress bar, 30s rest, auto-advance, YouTube music via postMessage
  - session-history.js — localStorage schema + streak counter + dashboard rendering
  - move-library.js — client-side filter/search
  - README.md — dev setup, deploy instructions, data pipeline overview
  
  Conventions: DAPP_PAGE_CONVENTIONS.md for meta/OG/favicon (12 tags/page), agroverse_shop design tokens, youtube-nocookie embeds, no frameworks.
  
  Commit: 79321e2 on main branch, pushed to TrueSightDAO/capoeira.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 150.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
